reply:
[[BLOCK:slide71_shape0]]
Recommendations

[[BLOCK:slide71_shape1]]
If your colleague or the reviewer prefers a conventional solution (and expects the term “regression”), use Generalized Regression.  
If there are numerous predictors and some exhibit Multi-collinearity, use Generalized Regression.  
In most cases, Elastic NET is preferable.  
If the data structure is wide, use Double Lasso.  
In most cases, use Adaptive Elastic NET.  
If the relationship is nonlinear, use an Artificial Neural Network (Artificial Neural Network) (this will be discussed in Unit 7).
